findingDetails.title: Python doctor/advisor support scripts still resolve singular OpenCode roots after the plural rename
findingDetails.recommendation: Patch audit_descriptions.py to plural skills/commands/agents, patch skill_advisor.py native bridge constants to .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit, and add zero-coverage plus --force-native smoke guards.

evidence: mcp_server/package.json is absent at repo root
shell-common.sh is_phase_parent has no singular/sk-deep hit
audit_descriptions.py --json reported 0 skills and 0 commands while plural skills exist
live .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/hooks/claude tree has no singular/sk-deep hits
sampled .codex/agents and .gemini/agents leaf mirrors have no singular/sk-deep hits

title: Python doctor/advisor support scripts still resolve singular OpenCode roots after the plural rename
recommendation: Patch plural roots in both Python scripts and add coverage assertions plus force-native smoke verification.

subject: P1-014
evidence: The scripts are active doctor/advisor support tools, not archived docs
The audit output silently excludes current skills and commands
The advisor native path is an explicit force-native failure while local fallback remains healthy
reason: The defect weakens verification and routing support surfaces after the plural rename; fallback behavior prevents P0 escalation.

subject: .github/workflows
reason: Directory absent in this checkout; no CI YAML singular-path or sk-deep finding available.

subject: package entries
reason: Root package.json and .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/package.json have no singular-root or sk-deep references; top-level mcp_server/package.json is absent.

subject: validate.sh and is_phase_parent
reason: No singular-root or sk-deep literal found in validate.sh or the shell is_phase_parent helper; adjacent P1-013 remains active in check-smart-router.sh.

subject: Claude hooks and Codex/Gemini leaf mirrors
reason: Prompt-specified hook path is absent; live mcp_server/hooks/claude and sampled .codex/.gemini mirrors produced no singular-root or sk-deep hits.
